buggy_code:
name = 'Alice'
print('Hello, %s. You are %d years old.' % (name))
task: Format a greeting with name and age using % formatting
error_location: line 2: only one value in tuple but two format specifiers
clarification_query: How many values must be in the tuple when two format specifiers (%s and %d) are used?
corrected_code:
name = 'Alice'
age = 30
print('Hello, %s. You are %d years old.' % (name, age))
explanation: Two format specifiers (%s and %d) require a tuple with 2 values. Providing only one causes TypeError.
